rationale: Claimant explicitly reported a stolen bike with clear ownership and purchase value; this is a straightforward larceny claim covered under the renters policy.
claim_summary: Blake Okafor (POL-1007) reports theft of a 2024 commuter bike stolen yesterday morning, estimated value $800. Renters policy covers theft with a $250 deductible and $50,000 limit. Low-severity claim well within coverage.
